title: ASCEND Game State
description: The complete serializable game state. One JSON object per save file. Every variable, typed. See docs/04_state_schema.md for design rationale and integration notes.

isoTimestamp.description: ISO 8601 datetime string (e.g. '2034-09-01T09:00:00Z'). In-fiction timestamps use 2034+ dates; real-world save timestamps use actual time.

backgroundId.description: One of the 7 player backgrounds. See docs/05_character_creation.md for full spec.

traitId.description: A behavioral trait ID from the 12-trait pool. See data/traits.json for definitions.

npcId.description: Stable NPC identifier. First 5 are MVP Tier 1. Full 25 NPC IDs expand as Tier 2 NPCs are specced in docs/06_npc_bible_*.md.

relationshipBand.description: Derived from relationship score: cold(0-24), functional(25-49), warm(50-69), trusted(70-84), invested(85-100). Computed, not stored — included here for engine documentation.

ladderLevel.description: L1 Associate → L2 Analyst → L3 Senior Analyst → L4 Lead → L5 Manager → L6 Senior Manager → L7 Director → L8 Senior Director → L9 VP → L10 SVP → L11 EVP → L12 C-Suite.

gameYear.description: In-game year. Year 1 = first year at AUREL London.

questionId.description: Stable question identifier. Format: y01q03 = Year 1, Question 3. See data/questions/year*/q*.json.

choiceId.description: Single lowercase letter identifying the choice made within a question: 'a', 'b', 'c', or 'd'.

consequenceTag.description: A consequence tag pushed to the queue by a question choice. Examples: seen_by_sponsor, burned_peer, integrity_debt_minor, integrity_debt_major, latent_offer, coalition_builder, high_cost_high_fidelity, systemic_read, open_inquiry, reliability_concern, track_product, track_commercial, track_cto.

delta.description: Applied after Resilience mitigation and floor/ceiling clamping.

reason.description: Shown in Consequences Drawer for visible stats. Omit for hidden stats.

hidden.description: If true, delta is not shown to player. Always true for pillars and cognitive axes.

delta.description: Applied after Collaborative Pull modifier and floor/ceiling clamping at 0–100.

hidden.description: If true, the NPC relationship change is not shown in Consequences Drawer.

key.description: Namespaced flag key. Convention: npc.{npcId}.{flag}, track.{track}.{flag}, story.{arc}.{flag}, ending.{path}.eligible.

promotionOutcome.description: Three possible Annual Review promotion outcomes. promoted_conditionally = title without authority, prove-it year. This is the most interesting outcome and should fire often.

careerTrack.description: Career track the player is currently engaging. Determined by question choice patterns and stat thresholds. 'generalist' is default until a track-specific gate is crossed.

scorecardBand.description: One of four promotion scorecard bands. Surfaced from Q8 onward. Used in Annual Review Promotion Scorecard across Delivery, Visibility, Trust, Readiness dimensions.

consequenceTrigger.description: Condition that causes a queued consequence to fire. One of: immediate, year-offset, stat-threshold, or npc-threshold.

yearsFromNow.description: Fires at end of Annual Review N years from the year the tag was pushed.

meta.description: Save file metadata. Used for versioning, migration, and telemetry.

schemaVersion.description: Semantic version of this schema. Increment minor for backwards-compatible additions; major for breaking changes.

gameVersion.description: Version of the game build that wrote this save.

saveId.description: Unique identifier for this save file. Generated once at creation; never changes.

createdAt.description: Real-world timestamp when this save was first created.

lastSavedAt.description: Real-world timestamp of the most recent save. Updated after every choice (the save fires after every choice — no undo).

totalPlaytimeSeconds.description: Cumulative seconds of active play. Used for anonymous telemetry (opt-in).

telemetryConsent.description: Whether the player has opted into anonymous, opt-in telemetry. Default false.

player.description: Immutable player profile set during onboarding. Never changes after character creation.

name.description: Player-entered name. Free text. Rendered in narrative, Annual Review, and Journal.

pronouns.description: Player-entered pronouns. Free text. Used throughout narrative text substitutions.

backgroundId.description: Chosen background. Grants starting attribute bonuses and flavors early dialogue.

traitIds.description: Exactly 3 traits chosen from the pool of 12 during onboarding. Each trait sets cognitive axis values and may gate early dialogue options.

progress.description: Current game position. The source of truth for what screen and state the player is in.

phase.description: Current game phase. 'question' is the main play state. 'annual_review' is the ceremonial year-end scene. 'year_end_opportunity' is the Three-Lane Opportunity selection. 'ended' = game complete.

year.description: Current in-game year. Increments after the Annual Review is resolved.

questionNumber.description: Which question within the current year (1–10). Only meaningful when phase='question'.

ladderLevel.description: Current ladder level. Updated by Annual Review promotion outcomes.

conditionalPromotion.description: True if the player is currently in a 'Promoted Conditionally' prove-it year. Cleared when next Annual Review fires a full Promoted or Not Promoted outcome.

careerTrack.description: Currently engaged career track. Updated when track-gated questions are answered.

endingPath.description: The ending path the player is currently eligible for. Computed annually. Null until Y6. Multiple can be eligible; only one resolves at Y12.

attributes.description: Current attribute state. Updated after every question choice. See data/attributes.schema.json for full spec.

attributeHistory.description: Point-in-time attribute snapshots taken at the end of each Annual Review. Used by Career Timeline and save-state diff view.

snapshot.description: Full copy of attributes object at the moment the Annual Review resolved.

npcRelationships.description: Relationship state for every NPC the player has encountered. Keyed by npcId. NPCs not yet encountered are absent from this map.

^[a-z][a-z0-9_]*$.description: Relationship state for a single NPC.

score.description: Current relationship score. Bands: cold(0-24), functional(25-49), warm(50-69), trusted(70-84), invested(85-100). Starting score for unmet NPCs is set by Reputation modifier at introduction.

arcBeatsCompleted.description: List of completed arc beat IDs for this NPC. Arc beat IDs are defined in docs/06_npc_bible_*.md.

flags.description: NPC-specific flags. Examples: {burned: true}, {trusted_advisor: true}, {sofia_sentience_acknowledged: true}. Namespaced within the NPC; global flags use the top-level flags map.

activeConsequenceTags.description: Consequence tags currently active against this NPC relationship (e.g. burned_peer, seen_by_sponsor). Used by the consequence engine to determine pending relationship adjustments.

consequenceQueue.description: Pending consequences that will fire in the future. Populated by question choices (0–3 tags per choice). Resolved by the consequence engine at question boundaries, year-end, and Annual Review. The queue is the game's memory.

id.description: Unique identifier for this queued consequence. Never reused.

sourceQuestionId.description: The question that pushed this consequence.

payload.description: What happens when the consequence fires.

statDeltas.description: Stat changes applied when consequence fires.

npcDeltas.description: NPC relationship changes applied when consequence fires.

flagOperations.description: Flags set or cleared when consequence fires.

unlockQuestionIds.description: Questions that become available as a result of this consequence firing.

narrativeNote.description: Optional internal note for writers — never shown to player. Explains what this consequence represents in story terms.

fired.description: True once the consequence has resolved. Fired consequences remain in the array for save-state diff view and Journal reconstruction.

firedYear.description: The year in which this consequence fired. Null until fired=true.

questionHistory.description: Record of every question the player has answered, in order. Append-only — never mutated after a choice is written.

statDeltasApplied.description: The stat deltas that were applied immediately when this choice was made (before Resilience mitigation). Historical record.

npcDeltasApplied.description: The NPC relationship changes applied immediately at choice time.

consequenceId.description: Links to the specific entry in consequenceQueue.

tagsQueued.description: Consequence tags pushed to the queue by this choice, with their queue entry IDs.

innerMonologue.description: The one-line internal monologue shown in the Consequences Drawer after this choice. Pulled from the question content file; stored here for Journal reconstruction.

answeredAt.description: Real-world timestamp when this choice was committed. The save fires at this moment.

annualReviews.description: Record of every completed Annual Review. One entry per year (after Year 1 ends). Append-only.

totalAmount.description: Annual compensation in GBP. The number Dana says aloud.

formula.description: Breakdown of the comp formula: 40% attribute aggregate + 30% performance + 20% sponsor strength + 10% hidden political capital.

attributeAggregate.description: Weighted stat aggregate: ExecutionDiscipline(30%) + StrategicInfluence(20%) + Reputation(20%) + remaining 7 stats averaged(30%).

performanceScore.description: Derived from the year's question choices: ratio of high-fidelity options chosen, consequences resolved positively, and NPC relationships maintained.

sponsorStrength.description: Averaged relationship score of active Sponsor NPCs weighted by their current arc beat.

politicalCapital.description: Hidden. Derived from PoliticalAwareness, consequence tag history (seen_by_sponsor, coalition_builder), and senior NPC relationship scores.

promotionReason.description: Dana's stated reason for the promotion outcome. Used for Journal and Career Timeline. Drawn from review scene content, not procedurally generated.

scorecardBands.description: The four-dimension Promotion Scorecard surfaced from Q8 onward.

threeLaneChoice.description: The Three-Lane Opportunity presented and chosen at year-end.

hiddenConsequenceIds.description: IDs of consequences that will fire 1–2 years later if this lane is chosen. The player does not see these.

requiresAdaptiveNerve.description: AdaptiveNerve threshold required for this lane to be selectable (not just visible).

npcId.description: The NPC whose relationship changes as a result of this lane.

laneChosen.description: 'declined_all' is valid only if Adaptive Pole operatingStyle is <= -3 (Adaptive-pole wait-and-see choice).

reviewManagerNpcId.description: The NPC who conducted this review (Y1 = dana_sutcliffe). Changes if the player moves teams or manager NPCs' careers advance.

flags.description: Global game state flags. Arbitrary key-value store. Convention: use namespaced dot-notation keys. Boolean flags are most common. String and integer values are valid for flags that carry data (e.g. story.sofia.last_question_asked = 'y03q07').
